models.label: Baseline (grid + quali)
models.blurb: 10 lines: z-score the grid and qualifying gap. The bar every fancy model must beat.

models.label: Kalman (production)
models.blurb: Car + driver pace filter, forward-chained; fuses this race's quali. Ships the app's probabilities.

models.label: Position-resolution sim
models.blurb: Track position is a state — you only pass if you're enough faster. Our best ordering engine.

models.label: Position sim + held-up asymmetry
models.blurb: As above, but backmarkers yield to much-faster cars (brief 30) — better win/recovery.
